title: verifier artefact
description: Result envelope written by a verifier after checking one stage card against its acceptance criteria. Stored under state/verifiers/<stage-id>.json.

stage_id.description: Stage id matching the stage card basename.

verifier_identity.description: Identity string for the verifier that produced this artefact.

verifier_invocation.description: Human-readable command or harness route used to invoke the verifier.

ran_at.description: Timestamp recorded by the verifier. Prefer ISO 8601 UTC, but historical artefacts are accepted as plain strings.

id.description: Acceptance criterion number from the stage card.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting the verdict, typically file references or command results.

additional_findings.description: Extra verifier notes that are not tied to one criterion.

overall.description: Overall verifier result for the stage.
